Operation.Documentation: Generates a bill based on the provided bill information.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Generates a bill based on the provided bill information.
Operation.Name: bill
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: bill id if the bill was successfully generated, "0" otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: bill id if the bill was successfully generated, "0" otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the details of the bill to be generated
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the details of the bill to be generated
Parameter.Name: billInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves details of a bill based on its ID.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves details of a bill based on its ID.
Operation.Name: getBillInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list containing bill details
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list containing bill details

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the bill
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the bill
Parameter.Name: billID

Operation.Documentation: Processes a refund based on the provided refund information.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Processes a refund based on the provided refund information.
Operation.Name: refund
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the refund was successful, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the refund was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the details of the refund to be processed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the details of the refund to be processed
Parameter.Name: refundInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the payment history of patients.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the payment history of patients.
Operation.Name: getPaymentHistory
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list containing the payment history of patients
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list containing the payment history of patients

Parameter.Documentation: the number of rows to fetch
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the number of rows to fetch
Parameter.Name: rows

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the profile information of the doctor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the profile information of the doctor.
Operation.Name: getProfileInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a HashMap containing the profile information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a HashMap containing the profile information

Operation.Documentation: Updates the basic profile information of the doctor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the basic profile information of the doctor.
Operation.Name: updateProfileInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the update was successful, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the update was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information to be updated
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to be updated
Parameter.Name: info

Operation.Documentation: Updates the doctor's specific details (e.g., specialization, experience,etc.).
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the doctor's specific details (e.g., specialization, experience,etc.).
Operation.Name: updateDoctorInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the update was successful, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the update was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information to be updated
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to be updated
Parameter.Name: info

Operation.Documentation: Updates the doctor's account information (e.g., username, password, etc.).
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the doctor's account information (e.g., username, password, etc.).
Operation.Name: updateAccountInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the update was successful, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the update was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information to be updated
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to be updated
Parameter.Name: info

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Name: doctorTimeTable
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays representing the doctor's timetable
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays representing the doctor's timetable

Operation.Documentation: Removes a time slot from the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Removes a time slot from the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Name: removeDoctorTime
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the time slot was successfully removed, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the time slot was successfully removed, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the time slot to be removed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the time slot to be removed
Parameter.Name: id

Operation.Documentation: Adds a new time slot to the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds a new time slot to the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Name: doctorTimeTableAddSlot
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the time slot was successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the time slot was successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the day of the week
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the day of the week
Parameter.Name: day

Parameter.Documentation: the time slot to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the time slot to be added
Parameter.Name: timeSlot

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the list of appointments for the doctor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the list of appointments for the doctor.
Operation.Name: getAppointments
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing appointment details
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing appointment details

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the test results for a patient based on the search criteria.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the test results for a patient based on the search criteria.
Operation.Name: getTestResults
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the test results
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the test results

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves patient information based on the search criteria.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves patient information based on the search criteria.
Operation.Name: getPatientInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a nested list of arrays containing patient information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a nested list of arrays containing patient information

Parameter.Documentation: the type of search (e.g., patient ID, name)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the type of search (e.g., patient ID, name)
Parameter.Name: searchType

Parameter.Documentation: the search keyword (e.g., patient ID or name)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the search keyword (e.g., patient ID or name)
Parameter.Name: searchWord

Operation.Documentation: Adds diagnostic details for a patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds diagnostic details for a patient.
Operation.Name: diagnose
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the diagnostic details were successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the diagnostic details were successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the diagnostic information
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the diagnostic information
Parameter.Name: diagnostic

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient being diagnosed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient being diagnosed
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: Adds allergy information for a patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds allergy information for a patient.
Operation.Name: allergies
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the allergy information was successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the allergy information was successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the allergy information
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the allergy information
Parameter.Name: allergies

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient with allergies
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient with allergies
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: Adds prescription details (e.g., drugs and tests) for a patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds prescription details (e.g., drugs and tests) for a patient.
Operation.Name: prescribe
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the prescription details were successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the prescription details were successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the prescribed drugs
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the prescribed drugs
Parameter.Name: drugs

Parameter.Documentation: the prescribed tests
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the prescribed tests
Parameter.Name: tests

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: patientDetails except age
Operation.Documentation_plain: patientDetails except age
Operation.Name: getPatientDetails

Operation.Documentation: Insert to PathologyTest full report
Operation.Documentation_plain: Insert to PathologyTest full report

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.Documentation: Insert to RFT full report
Operation.Documentation_plain: Insert to RFT full report

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.Documentation: Insert to CPK full report
Operation.Documentation_plain: Insert to CPK full report
Operation.Name: SeriumCreatinePhosphokinaseTotal
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.Documentation_plain: Insert to HIV full report
Operation.Name: SeriumCreatinePhosphokinase

Operation.Documentation: Insert to LFT full report
Operation.Documentation_plain: Insert to LFT full report
Operation.Name: liverFunctionTest
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the profile information of the pharmacist.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the profile information of the pharmacist.
Operation.Name: getProfileInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a HashMap containing the profile information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a HashMap containing the profile information

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the prescription information for a specified patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the prescription information for a specified patient.
Operation.Name: getPrescriptionInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing prescription details for the patient
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing prescription details for the patient

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient for whom the prescription details are required
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient for whom the prescription details are required
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the pharmacy history for patients, limited by the specified numberof rows.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the pharmacy history for patients, limited by the specified numberof rows.
Operation.Name: getpharmacyHistory
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing pharmacy history details for patients
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing pharmacy history details for patients

Parameter.Documentation: the number of rows to limit the pharmacy history
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the number of rows to limit the pharmacy history
Parameter.Name: rows

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the information about a drug based on its ID.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the information about a drug based on its ID.
Operation.Name: getDrugInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing information about the specified drug
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing information about the specified drug

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the drug to retrieve information for
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the drug to retrieve information for
Parameter.Name: drugID

Operation.Documentation: Adds a new drug to the system.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds a new drug to the system.
Operation.Name: addNewDrug
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the drug was successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the drug was successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information about the drug to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information about the drug to be added
Parameter.Name: drugInfo

Operation.Documentation: Adds new stock for a drug to the system.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds new stock for a drug to the system.
Operation.Name: addNewStock
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the stock was successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the stock was successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information about the stock to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information about the stock to be added
Parameter.Name: stockInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the stock details for a specified supplier.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the stock details for a specified supplier.
Operation.Name: getStockInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing stock details for the specified supplier
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing stock details for the specified supplier

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the supplier whose stock details are required
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the supplier whose stock details are required
Parameter.Name: supplierID

Operation.Name: getSupplierSummary
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> of supplier id and delivered stocks
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> of supplier id and delivered stocks

Operation.Name: getSupplierNames
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: HashMap<String,String> of supplier name and supplier id
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: HashMap<String,String> of supplier name and supplier id

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Name: getDoctorTimeTable
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the doctor's schedule information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the doctor's schedule information

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the information of a specific patient using their patient ID.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the information of a specific patient using their patient ID.
Operation.Name: getPatientInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the patient's information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the patient's information

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient whose information is required
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient whose information is required
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: Updates the information of a specific patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the information of a specific patient.
Operation.Name: setPatientInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the patient information was successfully updated, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the patient information was successfully updated, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information to update for the patient - String containing basic info separated by commas and spaces ex:"nic 9532648675,gender f,date_of_birth 19950203,address145|town1|Street1,mobile 0775123465,first_nameheshan,last_name eranga,email erangamx@gmail.com"
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to update for the patient - String containing basic info separated by commas and spaces ex:"nic 9532648675,gender f,date_of_birth 19950203,address145|town1|Street1,mobile 0775123465,first_nameheshan,last_name eranga,email erangamx@gmail.com"
Parameter.Name: patientInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the appointment details for a patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the appointment details for a patient.
Operation.Name: getAppointments
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the appointment details
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the appointment details

Operation.Documentation: Makes an appointment for a patient with a specified doctor at a given time.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Makes an appointment for a patient with a specified doctor at a given time.
Operation.Name: makeAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the appointment was successfully made, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the appointment was successfully made, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Name: patientID

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the doctor for the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the doctor for the appointment
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Operation.Name: makeLabAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean if the appointment was successfully made or not
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean if the appointment was successfully made or not

Parameter.Documentation: id of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: id of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Name: patientID

Parameter.Documentation: id of the doctor
Parameter.Documentation_plain: id of the doctor
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Parameter.Documentation: test id
Parameter.Documentation_plain: test id
Parameter.Name: testID

Parameter.Documentation: day of the week
Parameter.Documentation_plain: day of the week
Parameter.Name: day

Parameter.Documentation: time slot of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: time slot of the appointment
Parameter.Name: timeSlot

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the available appointment times for a specified doctor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the available appointment times for a specified doctor.
Operation.Name: doctorAppointmentAvailableTime
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the available times for the doctor's appointments
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the available times for the doctor's appointments

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the doctor for whom the available appointment times are needed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the doctor for whom the available appointment times are needed
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Operation.Name: getDoctorSummary
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about all the Doctors in the hospital{doctorID, specializesAreas,doctorFirstName, doctorLastName,availableDays, days}
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about all the Doctors in the hospital{doctorID, specializesAreas,doctorFirstName, doctorLastName,availableDays, days}

Operation.Name: getCurrentlyAvailableDoctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about the Doctors currently available at the time
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about the Doctors currently available at the time

Operation.Name: getConsultationAreas
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<String> consultation Areas of the doctor in the hospital
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> consultation Areas of the doctor in the hospital

Operation.Name: getDoctor
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with list of doctor's with registration numbers and names
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with list of doctor's with registration numbers and names

Parameter.Documentation: doctor consultation area
Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctor consultation area
Parameter.Name: ConsultationArea

Operation.Name: getDoctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: names of the doctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: names of the doctors

Operation.Name: getAvailableDays
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<String> of days that doctor available in the hospital
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> of days that doctor available in the hospital

Parameter.Documentation: doctors registration number
Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctors registration number
Parameter.Name: registrationNo

Operation.Name: getLabAvailableDays
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: available days
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: available days

Operation.Name: getLabAvailableTimeSlots
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: available days
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: available days

Operation.Name: getLabTestID
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: available days
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: available days

Operation.Name: getAvailableTime
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<String> of Doctors available time
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> of Doctors available time

Parameter.Documentation: doctors registration number
Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctors registration number
Parameter.Name: registrationNo

Parameter.Documentation: day selected for the Appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: day selected for the Appointment
Parameter.Name: day

Operation.Name: cancelAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean value if the operation was successful or not
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean value if the operation was successful or not

Parameter.Documentation: appointment ID of the canceling appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: appointment ID of the canceling appointment
Parameter.Name: appointmentID

Operation.Name: cancelLabAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean value if the operation was successful or not
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean value if the operation was successful or not

Parameter.Documentation: appointment ID of the canceling appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: appointment ID of the canceling appointment
Parameter.Name: appointmentID

Operation.Name: getAppointmentDetails
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> containing date, patient name, consultant name
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> containing date, patient name, consultant name

Parameter.Documentation: appointment ID of the searching appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: appointment ID of the searching appointment
Parameter.Name: appID

Operation.Name: getLabAppointmentDetails
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> containing date, patient name, consultant name
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> containing date, patient name, consultant name

Parameter.Documentation: appointment ID of the searching appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: appointment ID of the searching appointment
Parameter.Name: appID
